about.intro.title: ABOUT ABG
about.intro.label: SYSTEM_OVERVIEW // BRAND_MANIFESTO
about.chapter1.title: THE_NAME: ACOUSTIC BUT GOATED
about.chapter1.text1: "ACOUSTIC BUT GOATED" presents the unvarnished truth of the brand: raw but revered. Pure but powerful. We don't need the production value—just the goods.
about.chapter1.text2: Acoustic. Not because we're lo-fi, but because we're honest. Everything here is stripped to what matters: the product, the story, and the community that wears it.
about.chapter2.title: THE_CONTEXT: SAMYAN SANDBOX
about.chapter2.text1: Symbols of culture are often sold as imports. They arrive from abroad, marked up through distribution, stripped of context. They don't feel like ours.
about.chapter2.text2: ABG was born out of Samyan campus—a space of extreme contrast. Raw concrete shophouses stand side-by-side with modern towers; street vendors trade under tech-hubs. We wanted to design garments that document our local space, our inside jokes, and our culture.
about.chapter3.title: THE_PRODUCT: UNIFORM SPECIFICATION
about.chapter3.text1: Not merch. A uniform. A way to announce that you belong. That you understand the code. That this is your campus, your time, your moment.
about.chapter3.text2: Each release documents a chapter. Our silhouettes are built with structured cuts, heavy GSM cotton, and raw architectural details. Limited runs. No restocks. Once it's gone, it's history.
about.chapter4.title: THE_NETWORK: COMMUNITY NODE
about.chapter4.text1: ABG is for people who live in symbolism. For those who understand that fashion is architecture—a way to signal, to belong, to persist.
about.chapter4.text2: It's a decentralized conversation between people who get it. People who move through campus knowing that style is syntax.
about.chapter4.footer: IF YOU ARE READING THIS, YOU ALREADY KNOW. DON'T TELL EVERYONE.
